title: Smoky French Cabbage Salad
description: A smoky, flaky cabbage salad marinated in miso and maple, finished on a tava griddle for a post‑workout boost.
instructions: Trim the cabbage and shred it finely into a large mixing bowl.
Whisk together miso paste, maple syrup, tamari, sesame oil, smoked paprika, red pepper flakes, and lime juice until smooth.
Pour the miso dressing over the shredded cabbage and toss to coat evenly.
Let the mixture marinate for 10 minutes at room temperature to allow flavors to develop.
Preheat a tava griddle over medium‑high heat until it reaches a shimmering surface.
Spread the marinated cabbage in a thin, even layer on the hot griddle.
Cook for 3–4 minutes, flipping once, until the edges become smoky and lightly blistered.
Remove from heat and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and chopped cilantro over the cabbage.
Gently stir to distribute the toppings and allow the seeds to toast slightly.
Serve immediately as a post‑workout snack; the smoky, flaky texture pairs well with a protein shake.
